description_long: This is a rectangular, two-tone wooden cabinet or shelf with a dark brown top and base, and lighter, off-white sides and back. The front features an open shelf divided into two compartments by a vertical divider, providing accessible storage space. The structure is solid and boxy, with clean, straight lines and no visible handles, doors, or drawers. The back and sides are fully enclosed, while the front is open, making it suitable for storing or displaying items. The overall design is modern and functional, likely intended for use as a TV stand, media console, or low storage unit in urban environments. The materials and finish suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern, two-tone wooden cabinet or shelf with an open front and divided storage space, featuring a dark brown top and base with lighter sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf divided into two compartments, with dark brown top and base and lighter side panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, light-colored side panel and the thickness of the dark brown top and base.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a fully enclosed, light-colored back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and the layered construction of the top and base.
